sentences.text: Thad had a swift thin van with Theo.
A swift thin taxi sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad and Theo set a swift thin van with Seth.
A swift thin wagon ran with Thad and Theo.
Theo had a thin taxi and Thad got the wagon.
Thad set a thin van and Theo got the forklift.
A thin taxi ran past Thad with Theo and Beth.
Thad and Theo had a thin kart at the path.
Theo got a thin forklift and Thad got the wagon.
A swift thin taxi met Thad, Theo, and Seth.

2.text: A swift thin taxi met Thad.

sentences.text: Thad and Theo set a thin taxi with Beth.
Theo got a thin tram and Thad got the bus.
A swift thin forklift sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad let Theo run a thin van with Seth.
A thin kart sat with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
Thad and Theo set a thin taxi at the shed.
A swift thin van ran past Thad with Theo.
Theo had a thin kart and Thad had the wagon.
Thad and Theo met a thin tram on the path.
A thin forklift sat with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
